records.m_Talk_ENG: You bastards! Come get some!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You bastards! Come get some!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You bastards! Come get some!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! They just keep coming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! They just keep coming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! They just keep coming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Major! We're almost at the Artifact storage zone you specified!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Major! We're almost at the Artifact storage zone you specified!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Major! We're almost at the Artifact storage zone you specified!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll hold the line here! Go on ahead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll hold the line here! Go on ahead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll hold the line here! Go on ahead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then I'll leave it to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then I'll leave it to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then I'll leave it to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unload every last round you've got!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unload every last round you've got!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unload every last round you've got!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our job is to escort the Counters to their destination!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our job is to escort the Counters to their destination!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our job is to escort the Counters to their destination!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what it takes, we hold this position to the end!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what it takes, we hold this position to the end!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what it takes, we hold this position to the end!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've reached the storage zone! Move it, everyone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've reached the storage zone! Move it, everyone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've reached the storage zone! Move it, everyone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leaf Node! Seal off all bulwarks in this area! Now...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leaf Node! Seal off all bulwarks in this area! Now...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leaf Node! Seal off all bulwarks in this area! Now...!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
*Huff...* *Huff
8v!*
records.m_Talk_DEU:
*Huff...* *Huff
8v!*
records.m_Talk_FRA:
*Huff...* *Huff
8v!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did we hold the line? Kyle! Rookie! Are you both okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did we hold the line? Kyle! Rookie! Are you both okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did we hold the line? Kyle! Rookie! Are you both okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! Perfect timing, hacker!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! Perfect timing, hacker!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! Perfect timing, hacker!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A second later and we'd have ended up flattened like waffles, side by side!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A second later and we'd have ended up flattened like waffles, side by side!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A second later and we'd have ended up flattened like waffles, side by side!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quiet, rookie. Without me, we'd all be dead meat right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quiet, rookie. Without me, we'd all be dead meat right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quiet, rookie. Without me, we'd all be dead meat right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not that I know how long that bulwark's actually going to hold...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not that I know how long that bulwark's actually going to hold...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not that I know how long that bulwark's actually going to hold...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha. I guess being canned is better than being waffle-pressed, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha. I guess being canned is better than being waffle-pressed, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha. I guess being canned is better than being waffle-pressed, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, let's move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, let's move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, let's move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We need to retrieve the Artifact while the bulwark's still holding back C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We need to retrieve the Artifact while the bulwark's still holding back C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We need to retrieve the Artifact while the bulwark's still holding back C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Verifying system authorization.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Verifying system authorization.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Verifying system authorization.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Authorization confirmed. Shutting down Immortal System test mode.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Authorization confirmed. Shutting down Immortal System test mode.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Authorization confirmed. Shutting down Immortal System test mode.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Detaching core from mainframe.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Detaching core from mainframe.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Detaching core from mainframe.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Now it makes sense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Now it makes sense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Now it makes sense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems this Immortal System Core is a device capable of breaking down and reconstructing matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems this Immortal System Core is a device capable of breaking down and reconstructing matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems this Immortal System Core is a device capable of breaking down and reconstructing matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That also explains why the emergency power was still functioning despite the damage caused by C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That also explains why the emergency power was still functioning despite the damage caused by C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That also explains why the emergency power was still functioning despite the damage caused by C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Core was actively restoring the damaged power facility to keep the facility operational.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Core was actively restoring the damaged power facility to keep the facility operational.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Core was actively restoring the damaged power facility to keep the facility operational.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a second, doesn't this seem off?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait a second, doesn't this seem off?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a second, doesn't this seem off?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no one alive in this facility, so what exactly was the system testing by itself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no one alive in this facility, so what exactly was the system testing by itself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no one alive in this facility, so what exactly was the system testing by itself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The test sample is gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The test sample is gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The test sample is gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without it, there's no way to determine what the system was attempting to duplicate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without it, there's no way to determine what the system was attempting to duplicate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without it, there's no way to determine what the system was attempting to duplicate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you're saying... someone took the original sample?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you're saying... someone took the original sample?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you're saying... someone took the original sample?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just what were the Administration and the States hiding away in a place like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just what were the Administration and the States hiding away in a place like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just what were the Administration and the States hiding away in a place like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me, Major?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me, Major?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me, Major?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now's probably not the best time for a sci-fi debate, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now's probably not the best time for a sci-fi debate, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now's probably not the best time for a sci-fi debate, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right. In any case, we've secured the Immortal System Core, which was our top priority.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right. In any case, we've secured the Immortal System Core, which was our top priority.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right. In any case, we've secured the Immortal System Core, which was our top priority.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once we secure an escape route...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once we secure an escape route...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once we secure an escape route...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sylvia! Get out of there, now...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sylvia! Get out of there, now...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sylvia! Get out of there, now...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaaah...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaaah...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaaah...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyle! Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyle! Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyle! Are you okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh, I can manage... it's nothing serious...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh, I can manage... it's nothing serious...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh, I can manage... it's nothing serious...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No way...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a Category 4 C.O.! Don't tell me that sleazeball failed..?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a Category 4 C.O.! Don't tell me that sleazeball failed..?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a Category 4 C.O.! Don't tell me that sleazeball failed..?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. Colonel wouldn't go down that easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. Colonel wouldn't go down that easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. Colonel wouldn't go down that easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not the Category 4 C.O. we were briefed on. It's a different one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not the Category 4 C.O. we were briefed on. It's a different one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not the Category 4 C.O. we were briefed on. It's a different one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then there was more than one Category 4 C.O. occupying this facility from the start...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then there was more than one Category 4 C.O. occupying this facility from the start...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then there was more than one Category 4 C.O. occupying this facility from the start...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh! The second one's coming! Get out of the way, now...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh! The second one's coming! Get out of the way, now...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh! The second one's coming! Get out of the way, now...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, I get that you two are close, but is now really the time for cuddling?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, I get that you two are close, but is now really the time for cuddling?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, I get that you two are close, but is now really the time for cuddling?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Amy Strickland...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Amy Strickland...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Amy Strickland...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you... just deflect an attack of a Category 4 C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you... just deflect an attack of a Category 4 C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you... just deflect an attack of a Category 4 C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! Quit staring like you've seen a ghost!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! Quit staring like you've seen a ghost!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! Quit staring like you've seen a ghost!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We never had a choice to begin with! Category 4 or not, we have to fight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We never had a choice to begin with! Category 4 or not, we have to fight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We never had a choice to begin with! Category 4 or not, we have to fight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on! Didn't you say this was an important operation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on! Didn't you say this was an important operation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on! Didn't you say this was an important operation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're gonna run, then hurry up and go! I'll buy you some time, so get moving!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're gonna run, then hurry up and go! I'll buy you some time, so get moving!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're gonna run, then hurry up and go! I'll buy you some time, so get moving!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No. It's the other way around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No. It's the other way around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No. It's the other way around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... the Immortal System Core...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... the Immortal System Core...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... the Immortal System Core...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave this to us. We'll deal with the Category 4 C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave this to us. We'll deal with the Category 4 C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave this to us. We'll deal with the Category 4 C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we're being honest, you're the one with the highest chance of completing the operation, Strickland.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we're being honest, you're the one with the highest chance of completing the operation, Strickland.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we're being honest, you're the one with the highest chance of completing the operation, Strickland.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Tch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Tch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Tch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hate taking on roles that leave me with bad dreams, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hate taking on roles that leave me with bad dreams, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hate taking on roles that leave me with bad dreams, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So if you die, don't go blaming me from the afterlife, got it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So if you die, don't go blaming me from the afterlife, got it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So if you die, don't go blaming me from the afterlife, got it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This way! Hurry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This way! Hurry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This way! Hurry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Pant* I got it, okay?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Pant* I got it, okay?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Pant* I got it, okay?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm running as fast as I can...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm running as fast as I can...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm running as fast as I can...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A blackout...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A blackout...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A blackout...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Probably because the Immortal System Core was removed. The emergency power must've shut down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Probably because the Immortal System Core was removed. The emergency power must've shut down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Probably because the Immortal System Core was removed. The emergency power must've shut down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From here on out, I can't control the facility systems anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From here on out, I can't control the facility systems anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From here on out, I can't control the facility systems anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All we can do now is hope Strickland made it out safely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All we can do now is hope Strickland made it out safely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All we can do now is hope Strickland made it out safely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before that... maybe we should worry about ourselves first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before that... maybe we should worry about ourselves first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before that... maybe we should worry about ourselves first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave this area to me, Sylvia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave this area to me, Sylvia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave this area to me, Sylvia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If a Category 4 C.O. shows up, you need to run. Immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If a Category 4 C.O. shows up, you need to run. Immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If a Category 4 C.O. shows up, you need to run. Immediately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? What are you talking about all of a sudden?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? What are you talking about all of a sudden?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? What are you talking about all of a sudden?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think... this is where my road ends...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think... this is where my road ends...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think... this is where my road ends...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've lost too much blood... My vision's been blurry for a while now... I can barely see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've lost too much blood... My vision's been blurry for a while now... I can barely see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've lost too much blood... My vision's been blurry for a while now... I can barely see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on... Was it because you covered me back there...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on... Was it because you covered me back there...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on... Was it because you covered me back there...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And sending away the rookie first... That was on purpose, wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And sending away the rookie first... That was on purpose, wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And sending away the rookie first... That was on purpose, wasn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Incoming, Sylvia...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Incoming, Sylvia...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Incoming, Sylvia...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time to argue, run!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time to argue, run!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time to argue, run!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyle, you fool! Even to the very end...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyle, you fool! Even to the very end...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyle, you fool! Even to the very end...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Category 4 C.O. suddenly...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Category 4 C.O. suddenly...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Category 4 C.O. suddenly...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, soldiers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, soldiers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, soldiers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Major Jaina Kropel, by order of the Deputy Commander, I've been dispatched to rescue you and secure the Artifact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Major Jaina Kropel, by order of the Deputy Commander, I've been dispatched to rescue you and secure the Artifact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Major Jaina Kropel, by order of the Deputy Commander, I've been dispatched to rescue you and secure the Artifact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander...? That damn GI actually sent someone to save us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander...? That damn GI actually sent someone to save us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander...? That damn GI actually sent someone to save us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah! Unbelievable... this is the first time I've ever felt thankful to that bastard!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah! Unbelievable... this is the first time I've ever felt thankful to that bastard!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah! Unbelievable... this is the first time I've ever felt thankful to that bastard!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem! Dramatic or not, let's keep the disrespect toward the Commander to a minimum.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem! Dramatic or not, let's keep the disrespect toward the Commander to a minimum.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem! Dramatic or not, let's keep the disrespect toward the Commander to a minimum.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you both all right? Any injuries? And where's the recovered Immortal System Core?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you both all right? Any injuries? And where's the recovered Immortal System Core?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you both all right? Any injuries? And where's the recovered Immortal System Core?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Kyle! We're alive! We actually survived this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Kyle! We're alive! We actually survived this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Kyle! We're alive! We actually survived this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing, Kyle?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing, Kyle?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing, Kyle?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you pointing your gun at the Major...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you pointing your gun at the Major...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you pointing your gun at the Major...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sylvia...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sylvia...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sylvia...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know who this person really is... but I'm pretty sure she's not on our side.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know who this person really is... but I'm pretty sure she's not on our side.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know who this person really is... but I'm pretty sure she's not on our side.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You showed up alone in an operation zone crawling with Category 4 C.O.s, with no backup whatsoever...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You showed up alone in an operation zone crawling with Category 4 C.O.s, with no backup whatsoever...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You showed up alone in an operation zone crawling with Category 4 C.O.s, with no backup whatsoever...

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the time we arrived, someone had already tampered with the test sample...
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the time we arrived, someone had already tampered with the test sample...
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the time we arrived, someone had already tampered with the test sample...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And most importantly...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And most importantly...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And most importantly...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The target Artifact was classified at the highest security level.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The target Artifact was classified at the highest security level.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The target Artifact was classified at the highest security level.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So tell me, how did you know about the Immortal System Core?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So tell me, how did you know about the Immortal System Core?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So tell me, how did you know about the Immortal System Core?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Haha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Haha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Haha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Major Kyle Wong, you've got some impressive intuition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Major Kyle Wong, you've got some impressive intuition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Major Kyle Wong, you've got some impressive intuition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, there's a piece of the puzzle you're missing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, there's a piece of the puzzle you're missing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, there's a piece of the puzzle you're missing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Given Dominic King Reginald's personality, it's highly likely he shared everything about the Terraside Project with those he trusted most.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Given Dominic King Reginald's personality, it's highly likely he shared everything about the Terraside Project with those he trusted most.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Given Dominic King Reginald's personality, it's highly likely he shared everything about the Terraside Project with those he trusted most.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So if Jaina Kropel were still alive, it wouldn't be strange for her to know about the Immortal System Core.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So if Jaina Kropel were still alive, it wouldn't be strange for her to know about the Immortal System Core.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So if Jaina Kropel were still alive, it wouldn't be strange for her to know about the Immortal System Core.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But because you lacked that knowledge, you were able to see through me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But because you lacked that knowledge, you were able to see through me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But because you lacked that knowledge, you were able to see through me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Terraside Project...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Terraside Project...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Terraside Project...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But everything according to the script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see the Immortal System Core isn't in your possession... so it looks like the recovery mission was a success.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see the Immortal System Core isn't in your possession... so it looks like the recovery mission was a success.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see the Immortal System Core isn't in your possession... so it looks like the recovery mission was a success.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, there's no need for me to interfere. You'll attempt the descent of an angel out of desperation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, there's no need for me to interfere. You'll attempt the descent of an angel out of desperation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, there's no need for me to interfere. You'll attempt the descent of an angel out of desperation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happens next, though... is anyone's guess...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happens next, though... is anyone's guess...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happens next, though... is anyone's guess...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Allow me to offer you some well-earned praise, Major Kyle Wong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Allow me to offer you some well-earned praise, Major Kyle Wong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Allow me to offer you some well-earned praise, Major Kyle Wong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In this world, you've fulfilled your <color=#ffd34c>role</color> to the fullest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In this world, you've fulfilled your <color=#ffd34c>role</color> to the fullest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In this world, you've fulfilled your <color=#ffd34c>role</color> to the fullest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then... it's time you made your swift exit from the stage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then... it's time you made your swift exit from the stage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then... it's time you made your swift exit from the stage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You bastards! Come get some!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You bastards! Come get some!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You bastards! Come get some!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! They just keep coming!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! They just keep coming!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! They just keep coming!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Major! We're almost at the Artifact storage zone you specified!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Major! We're almost at the Artifact storage zone you specified!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Major! We're almost at the Artifact storage zone you specified!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll hold the line here! Go on ahead!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll hold the line here! Go on ahead!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll hold the line here! Go on ahead!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then I'll leave it to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then I'll leave it to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then I'll leave it to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unload every last round you've got!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unload every last round you've got!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unload every last round you've got!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our job is to escort the Counters to their destination!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our job is to escort the Counters to their destination!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our job is to escort the Counters to their destination!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what it takes, we hold this position to the end!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what it takes, we hold this position to the end!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what it takes, we hold this position to the end!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've reached the storage zone! Move it, everyone!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've reached the storage zone! Move it, everyone!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've reached the storage zone! Move it, everyone!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leaf Node! Seal off all bulwarks in this area! Now...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leaf Node! Seal off all bulwarks in this area! Now...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leaf Node! Seal off all bulwarks in this area! Now...!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
*Huff...* *Huff
8v!*
root.m_Talk_DEU:
*Huff...* *Huff
8v!*
root.m_Talk_FRA:
*Huff...* *Huff
8v!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did we hold the line? Kyle! Rookie! Are you both okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did we hold the line? Kyle! Rookie! Are you both okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did we hold the line? Kyle! Rookie! Are you both okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! Perfect timing, hacker!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! Perfect timing, hacker!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! Perfect timing, hacker!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A second later and we'd have ended up flattened like waffles, side by side!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A second later and we'd have ended up flattened like waffles, side by side!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A second later and we'd have ended up flattened like waffles, side by side!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Quiet, rookie. Without me, we'd all be dead meat right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Quiet, rookie. Without me, we'd all be dead meat right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Quiet, rookie. Without me, we'd all be dead meat right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not that I know how long that bulwark's actually going to hold...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not that I know how long that bulwark's actually going to hold...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not that I know how long that bulwark's actually going to hold...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha. I guess being canned is better than being waffle-pressed, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha. I guess being canned is better than being waffle-pressed, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha. I guess being canned is better than being waffle-pressed, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, let's move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, let's move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, let's move.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We need to retrieve the Artifact while the bulwark's still holding back C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We need to retrieve the Artifact while the bulwark's still holding back C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We need to retrieve the Artifact while the bulwark's still holding back C.O.s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Verifying system authorization.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Verifying system authorization.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Verifying system authorization.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Authorization confirmed. Shutting down Immortal System test mode.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Authorization confirmed. Shutting down Immortal System test mode.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Authorization confirmed. Shutting down Immortal System test mode.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Detaching core from mainframe.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Detaching core from mainframe.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Detaching core from mainframe.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Now it makes sense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Now it makes sense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Now it makes sense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems this Immortal System Core is a device capable of breaking down and reconstructing matter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems this Immortal System Core is a device capable of breaking down and reconstructing matter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems this Immortal System Core is a device capable of breaking down and reconstructing matter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That also explains why the emergency power was still functioning despite the damage caused by C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That also explains why the emergency power was still functioning despite the damage caused by C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That also explains why the emergency power was still functioning despite the damage caused by C.O.s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Core was actively restoring the damaged power facility to keep the facility operational.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Core was actively restoring the damaged power facility to keep the facility operational.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Core was actively restoring the damaged power facility to keep the facility operational.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a second, doesn't this seem off?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait a second, doesn't this seem off?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a second, doesn't this seem off?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no one alive in this facility, so what exactly was the system testing by itself?
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no one alive in this facility, so what exactly was the system testing by itself?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no one alive in this facility, so what exactly was the system testing by itself?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The test sample is gone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The test sample is gone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The test sample is gone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Without it, there's no way to determine what the system was attempting to duplicate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Without it, there's no way to determine what the system was attempting to duplicate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Without it, there's no way to determine what the system was attempting to duplicate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you're saying... someone took the original sample?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you're saying... someone took the original sample?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you're saying... someone took the original sample?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just what were the Administration and the States hiding away in a place like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just what were the Administration and the States hiding away in a place like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just what were the Administration and the States hiding away in a place like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me, Major?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me, Major?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me, Major?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now's probably not the best time for a sci-fi debate, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now's probably not the best time for a sci-fi debate, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now's probably not the best time for a sci-fi debate, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're right. In any case, we've secured the Immortal System Core, which was our top priority.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're right. In any case, we've secured the Immortal System Core, which was our top priority.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're right. In any case, we've secured the Immortal System Core, which was our top priority.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once we secure an escape route...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once we secure an escape route...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once we secure an escape route...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sylvia! Get out of there, now...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sylvia! Get out of there, now...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sylvia! Get out of there, now...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaaah...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaaah...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaaah...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyle! Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyle! Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyle! Are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh, I can manage... it's nothing serious...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh, I can manage... it's nothing serious...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh, I can manage... it's nothing serious...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: No way...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No way...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No way...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's a Category 4 C.O.! Don't tell me that sleazeball failed..?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's a Category 4 C.O.! Don't tell me that sleazeball failed..?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's a Category 4 C.O.! Don't tell me that sleazeball failed..?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. Colonel wouldn't go down that easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. Colonel wouldn't go down that easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. Colonel wouldn't go down that easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's not the Category 4 C.O. we were briefed on. It's a different one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's not the Category 4 C.O. we were briefed on. It's a different one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's not the Category 4 C.O. we were briefed on. It's a different one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then there was more than one Category 4 C.O. occupying this facility from the start...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then there was more than one Category 4 C.O. occupying this facility from the start...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then there was more than one Category 4 C.O. occupying this facility from the start...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh! The second one's coming! Get out of the way, now...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh! The second one's coming! Get out of the way, now...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh! The second one's coming! Get out of the way, now...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, I get that you two are close, but is now really the time for cuddling?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, I get that you two are close, but is now really the time for cuddling?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, I get that you two are close, but is now really the time for cuddling?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Amy Strickland...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Amy Strickland...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Amy Strickland...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you... just deflect an attack of a Category 4 C.O.?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you... just deflect an attack of a Category 4 C.O.?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you... just deflect an attack of a Category 4 C.O.?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! Quit staring like you've seen a ghost!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! Quit staring like you've seen a ghost!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! Quit staring like you've seen a ghost!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We never had a choice to begin with! Category 4 or not, we have to fight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We never had a choice to begin with! Category 4 or not, we have to fight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We never had a choice to begin with! Category 4 or not, we have to fight!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come on! Didn't you say this was an important operation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come on! Didn't you say this was an important operation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come on! Didn't you say this was an important operation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're gonna run, then hurry up and go! I'll buy you some time, so get moving!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're gonna run, then hurry up and go! I'll buy you some time, so get moving!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're gonna run, then hurry up and go! I'll buy you some time, so get moving!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...No. It's the other way around.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...No. It's the other way around.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...No. It's the other way around.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is... the Immortal System Core...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is... the Immortal System Core...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is... the Immortal System Core...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave this to us. We'll deal with the Category 4 C.O.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave this to us. We'll deal with the Category 4 C.O.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave this to us. We'll deal with the Category 4 C.O.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we're being honest, you're the one with the highest chance of completing the operation, Strickland.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we're being honest, you're the one with the highest chance of completing the operation, Strickland.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we're being honest, you're the one with the highest chance of completing the operation, Strickland.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Tch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Tch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Tch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hate taking on roles that leave me with bad dreams, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hate taking on roles that leave me with bad dreams, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hate taking on roles that leave me with bad dreams, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So if you die, don't go blaming me from the afterlife, got it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So if you die, don't go blaming me from the afterlife, got it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So if you die, don't go blaming me from the afterlife, got it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This way! Hurry!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This way! Hurry!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This way! Hurry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Pant* I got it, okay?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Pant* I got it, okay?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Pant* I got it, okay?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm running as fast as I can...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm running as fast as I can...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm running as fast as I can...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A blackout...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A blackout...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A blackout...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Probably because the Immortal System Core was removed. The emergency power must've shut down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Probably because the Immortal System Core was removed. The emergency power must've shut down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Probably because the Immortal System Core was removed. The emergency power must've shut down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From here on out, I can't control the facility systems anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From here on out, I can't control the facility systems anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From here on out, I can't control the facility systems anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All we can do now is hope Strickland made it out safely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All we can do now is hope Strickland made it out safely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All we can do now is hope Strickland made it out safely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before that... maybe we should worry about ourselves first?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before that... maybe we should worry about ourselves first?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before that... maybe we should worry about ourselves first?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave this area to me, Sylvia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave this area to me, Sylvia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave this area to me, Sylvia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If a Category 4 C.O. shows up, you need to run. Immediately.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If a Category 4 C.O. shows up, you need to run. Immediately.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If a Category 4 C.O. shows up, you need to run. Immediately.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? What are you talking about all of a sudden?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? What are you talking about all of a sudden?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? What are you talking about all of a sudden?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think... this is where my road ends...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think... this is where my road ends...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think... this is where my road ends...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've lost too much blood... My vision's been blurry for a while now... I can barely see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've lost too much blood... My vision's been blurry for a while now... I can barely see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've lost too much blood... My vision's been blurry for a while now... I can barely see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on... Was it because you covered me back there...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on... Was it because you covered me back there...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on... Was it because you covered me back there...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And sending away the rookie first... That was on purpose, wasn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And sending away the rookie first... That was on purpose, wasn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And sending away the rookie first... That was on purpose, wasn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Incoming, Sylvia...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Incoming, Sylvia...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Incoming, Sylvia...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time to argue, run!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time to argue, run!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time to argue, run!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyle, you fool! Even to the very end...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyle, you fool! Even to the very end...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyle, you fool! Even to the very end...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Category 4 C.O. suddenly...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Category 4 C.O. suddenly...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Category 4 C.O. suddenly...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, soldiers?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, soldiers?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, soldiers?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Major Jaina Kropel, by order of the Deputy Commander, I've been dispatched to rescue you and secure the Artifact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Major Jaina Kropel, by order of the Deputy Commander, I've been dispatched to rescue you and secure the Artifact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Major Jaina Kropel, by order of the Deputy Commander, I've been dispatched to rescue you and secure the Artifact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander...? That damn GI actually sent someone to save us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander...? That damn GI actually sent someone to save us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander...? That damn GI actually sent someone to save us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah! Unbelievable... this is the first time I've ever felt thankful to that bastard!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah! Unbelievable... this is the first time I've ever felt thankful to that bastard!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah! Unbelievable... this is the first time I've ever felt thankful to that bastard!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem! Dramatic or not, let's keep the disrespect toward the Commander to a minimum.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem! Dramatic or not, let's keep the disrespect toward the Commander to a minimum.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem! Dramatic or not, let's keep the disrespect toward the Commander to a minimum.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you both all right? Any injuries? And where's the recovered Immortal System Core?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you both all right? Any injuries? And where's the recovered Immortal System Core?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you both all right? Any injuries? And where's the recovered Immortal System Core?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Kyle! We're alive! We actually survived this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Kyle! We're alive! We actually survived this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Kyle! We're alive! We actually survived this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing, Kyle?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing, Kyle?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing, Kyle?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you pointing your gun at the Major...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you pointing your gun at the Major...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you pointing your gun at the Major...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sylvia...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sylvia...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sylvia...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know who this person really is... but I'm pretty sure she's not on our side.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know who this person really is... but I'm pretty sure she's not on our side.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know who this person really is... but I'm pretty sure she's not on our side.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You showed up alone in an operation zone crawling with Category 4 C.O.s, with no backup whatsoever...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You showed up alone in an operation zone crawling with Category 4 C.O.s, with no backup whatsoever...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You showed up alone in an operation zone crawling with Category 4 C.O.s, with no backup whatsoever...

root.m_Talk_ENG: By the time we arrived, someone had already tampered with the test sample...
root.m_Talk_DEU: By the time we arrived, someone had already tampered with the test sample...
root.m_Talk_FRA: By the time we arrived, someone had already tampered with the test sample...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And most importantly...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And most importantly...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And most importantly...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The target Artifact was classified at the highest security level.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The target Artifact was classified at the highest security level.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The target Artifact was classified at the highest security level.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So tell me, how did you know about the Immortal System Core?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So tell me, how did you know about the Immortal System Core?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So tell me, how did you know about the Immortal System Core?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Haha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Haha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Haha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Major Kyle Wong, you've got some impressive intuition.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Major Kyle Wong, you've got some impressive intuition.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Major Kyle Wong, you've got some impressive intuition.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, there's a piece of the puzzle you're missing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, there's a piece of the puzzle you're missing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, there's a piece of the puzzle you're missing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Given Dominic King Reginald's personality, it's highly likely he shared everything about the Terraside Project with those he trusted most.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Given Dominic King Reginald's personality, it's highly likely he shared everything about the Terraside Project with those he trusted most.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Given Dominic King Reginald's personality, it's highly likely he shared everything about the Terraside Project with those he trusted most.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So if Jaina Kropel were still alive, it wouldn't be strange for her to know about the Immortal System Core.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So if Jaina Kropel were still alive, it wouldn't be strange for her to know about the Immortal System Core.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So if Jaina Kropel were still alive, it wouldn't be strange for her to know about the Immortal System Core.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But because you lacked that knowledge, you were able to see through me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But because you lacked that knowledge, you were able to see through me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But because you lacked that knowledge, you were able to see through me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Terraside Project...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Terraside Project...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Terraside Project...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But everything according to the script.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see the Immortal System Core isn't in your possession... so it looks like the recovery mission was a success.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see the Immortal System Core isn't in your possession... so it looks like the recovery mission was a success.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see the Immortal System Core isn't in your possession... so it looks like the recovery mission was a success.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, there's no need for me to interfere. You'll attempt the descent of an angel out of desperation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, there's no need for me to interfere. You'll attempt the descent of an angel out of desperation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, there's no need for me to interfere. You'll attempt the descent of an angel out of desperation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What happens next, though... is anyone's guess...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What happens next, though... is anyone's guess...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What happens next, though... is anyone's guess...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Allow me to offer you some well-earned praise, Major Kyle Wong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Allow me to offer you some well-earned praise, Major Kyle Wong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Allow me to offer you some well-earned praise, Major Kyle Wong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In this world, you've fulfilled your <color=#ffd34c>role</color> to the fullest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In this world, you've fulfilled your <color=#ffd34c>role</color> to the fullest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In this world, you've fulfilled your <color=#ffd34c>role</color> to the fullest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now then... it's time you made your swift exit from the stage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now then... it's time you made your swift exit from the stage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now then... it's time you made your swift exit from the stage.
